3266570.name: Puppet Master: The Game - Demonic Toys: Blood and Stitches Skin Pack
3266570.description:
Help support the game's development by purchasing this Puppet Master skin pack DLC

If you're enjoying the game and want to support us, check out our new DLC skin pack! It features Baby Oopsie Daisy and Jack Attack from Demonic Toys 2: Personal Demons (2009), Baby Oopsie’s Sacrificial Dagger and Gnarly Teddy from the original Demonic Toys movie, plus an all-new original design for Monster Teddy, Plush. 

CHARACTER SKINS

  • Baby Oopsie Daisy - Stitched Oopsie (DT2)

  • Jack Attack - Stitched Jack (DT2)

  • Grizzly Teddy - Gnarly Teddy (DT1)

  • Monster Teddy - Plush

WEAPON SKINS

  • Baby Oopsie’s Bitchen Knife - Sacrificial Dagger 

  • Jack Attack’s Box - Jack Box (DT2)

EMOTES

  • Baby Oopsie Daisy - Dance

  • Grizzly Teddy - Roar

  • Monster Teddy - Party Animal

MATURE CONTENT DESCRIPTION

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
